text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's the first day of summer camp. It's a
period of intense training wherein racers can
improve their skills!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Or so it should be, but...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Watermelon splitting, flowing noodles, and
barbeque parties with summer veggies, oh my! ☆

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
There are so many fun and buono things to do
during summer!
choice_data_list: Hey, we're here to train, remember?
Hey, we're here to train, remember?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Hehe! Yeah, I remember. I've got the Sprinters S.
waiting for me, after all!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Training is my number one priority. I'm going to
do my very, very best!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Bono! We got permission to do watermelon
splitting on the beach! ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: And Biko got a wooden sword for us to use! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Yay, thank you! And I brought a whole bunch of
sweet watermelons for us!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
I, um... So, we actually planned this out a while
back...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: So is it okay if I go?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After making one last promise to work hard
during practice, Hishi Akebono runs off to meet
with her friends at the beach.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
At any rate... my red-hot summer camp
experience with Hishi Akebono is off to a start!
